data.title: Stock market volatility briefly surpasses Bitcoin amid tariff drama
data.description:
In an unusual turn of events, recent data has shown that stock index volatility reached high levels that brought it on par with the volatility of the world’s most popular cryptocurrency, Bitcoin. The relatively stable traditional asset markets tested turbulent waters thanks to last week’s market activities that saw investors reacting to the tariffs issued […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/stock-market-volatility-surpasses-bitcoin/

data.title: VanEck proposes Bitcoin-linked Treasury bonds to offset $14 trillion in US debt
data.description:
VanEck’s head of digital assets research, Matthew Sigel, has proposed the introduction of “BitBonds,” a hybrid debt instrument combining US Treasuries with Bitcoin (BTC) exposure, as a novel strategy for managing the government’s looming $14 trillion refinancing requirement.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/vaneck-proposes-bitcoin-linked-treasury-bonds-to-offset-14-trillion-in-us-debt/

data.title: 4chan Breach Exposes Internal Chaos, Data in Major Hack by Rival Soyjak Party
data.description:
A massive breach revealed 4chan's source code, emails, and internal strife, as the controversial imageboard faces a new kind of chaos.
source: https://decrypt.co/314990/4chan-breach-chaos-data-major-hack

data.title: Movement Network Foundation investigates ‘market maker abnormalities’ amid alleged co-founder hiatus: Blockworks
data.description:

source: https://www.theblock.co/post/350927/movement-network-foundation-investigates-market-maker-abnormalities-blockworks?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Can Cardano Price Break Key Support Amid Major Whale Sell-Offs?
data.description:
Cardano (ADA) price has struggled to defend its position above an essential support point at $0. 63. This top altcoin may face a potential price decline because whales executed substantial ADA token sales. Whales selling off tokens often leads to a short-term price pullback
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/15/can-cardano-price-break-key-support-amid-major-whale-sell-offs/

data.title: ‘Rare as a white owl’: Bitcoin analysts break down divergence signals
data.description:
Bitcoin may be trading sideways, but experienced investors say this is no time to panic — and in fact, maybe a golden opportunity.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/markets/rare-as-a-white-owl-bitcoin-analysts-break-down-divergence-signals

data.title: Cardano (ADA) Chart Setup Hints At A Major Upside Ahead – Here’s Why
data.description:
Cardano (ADA) is flashing early signs of a potential breakout, with its latest chart structure suggesting that the bulls may be preparing for a major upside move, Thomas Anderson’s analysis. After weathering recent market volatility, ADA has carved out a base of support and is beginning to show constructive price action marked by rising lows and increasing buying interest. This shift hints that momentum is gradually tilting back in favor of the bulls. As the market eyes a recovery, ADA’s setup places it in a favorable position to capitalize on renewed bullish sentiment
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/cardano/cardano-major-upside-ahead/

data.title: XRP ETFs Likely Next to Get SEC Approval, Beating DOGE and Solana: Kaiko
data.description:
XRP exchange-traded funds may be the next SEC-approved product that gives investors exposure to crypto, according to data firm Kaiko.
source: https://decrypt.co/314925/xrp-etfs-likely-next-sec-approval-kaiko
